CustomField.description: Controls whether the test runs with @IsTest(SeeAllData=true) to validate real data volume, or SeeAllData=false to validate FLS/CRUD/object access only. Default false is recommended for ISV use cases.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: false = validates FLS/CRUD/object access only (no real data required). true = validates that the persona can see real records (requires data in org).
CustomField.label: See All Data
